codeReview.summary: The feature substantially improves CASH TDP data wiring and replaces ETH activity rows with CASH trades, but two required behaviors remain unmet: swap defaults still resolve to ETH, and Market cap/FDV remain unpopulated.

issues.description: useCashTokenData still hard-codes `marketCap` and `fdv` to null, and CashStats renders these as `—`. The feature description requires all six stats to be shown with values (TVL can be N/A, but Market cap and FDV should be populated/computed).

CashTDPProvider constructs currency from Ethereum native mainnet (`nativeOnChain(UniverseChainId.Mainnet)`), and TDPSwapComponent's default logic therefore seeds native token defaults (`getNativeAddress(currency.chainId)`), leaving ETH as the default side in the swap flow rather than CASH.

Header address text is rendered via `shortenAddress({ address })`, but the utility only supports EVM/SVM addresses, so Aptos addresses render as empty text in the header copy helper. The About section has a working custom Aptos address pill, but header-level address UX is still broken.

sharedStateObservations.observation: fork-worker verification guidance appears stale relative to this mission's scoped validation policy.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/fork-worker/SKILL.md:51 instructs `pnpm -r typecheck && pnpm -r test`, while mission AGENTS scopes checks and documents pre-existing failures in apps/trading/web (mission AGENTS.md:52,54,61,62).

sharedStateObservations.observation: fork-worker skill lacks explicit procedure notes for Aptos/non-EVM address compatibility when reusing Uniswap components.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff skill feedback calls this out directly (`suggestedChanges`): handoffs/2026-04-02T20-55-53-934Z__cash-tdp-full-data__8d9b9c6a-f3cb-4a50-976c-9d578a3db589.json:59-60; related issue noted at lines 47-48.

sharedStateObservations.observation: There is no shared-library note documenting that `shortenAddress` rejects Aptos addresses, despite this impacting CASH TDP header behavior.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: packages/uni-utilities/src/addresses/index.ts validates only EVM/SVM addresses before shortening; `.factory/library/` contains no `shortenAddress`/non-EVM compatibility note.

summary: Review result: fail. CASH-specific stats/activity/about wiring is largely present, but required acceptance behavior is incomplete because swap defaults still rely on ETH and Market cap/FDV remain unset.
